src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Replace string concatenation in log statements with SLF4J parameterized placeholders for better performance and readability.
Correct the syntax for lazy evaluation in logging by using a lambda supplier instead of string concatenation.
Prevent instantiation of the utility class by adding a private constructor that throws an exception.
src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.human_impl: private Lambda() { throw new IllegalStateException("Utility class"); }

src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Add comments to lambda expressions to explicitly state that returns are implicit.
Add spaces inside generic type angle brackets for formatting consistency.
Remove unnecessary blank lines between field declarations to compact the code.
src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.human_impl: Removed empty lines between static final fields.

src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Replace string concatenation in log statements with parameterized placeholders to improve performance and readability.
Renamed method parameters to be more descriptive and consistent with their usage.
Renamed methods to improve clarity and consistency in naming conventions.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Add Log4j import to support logging in stream operations.
Add test for creating a stream from a list.
Add test for creating a stream from a range.
Add test for creating a stream from specific values.
Add test for creating a stream using generate.
Add test for creating a stream using iterate with logging.
Add test for skipping the first element of a stream.
Add test for debugging stream elements.
Add test for flattening a stream of arrays.
src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.human_impl: void testFlatten() { ... new Flow().flatten(Stream.of(array1, array2, array3)) ... }

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Add test for terminal stream operations.
Rename test method from testFlattening to testFlatten to match implementation.
Reorder test methods to group stream creation and transformation tests logically.
src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.human_impl: Moved testSize, testToArray, testMax, testSum, testMul, etc. to new positions.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Wrap stream forEach calls with assertDoesNotThrow to explicitly verify that logging operations do not throw exceptions during testing.
Replace deprecated or verbose Arrays.asList usage with the more concise List.of factory method introduced in Java 9.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.1.2 for compatibility with newer Maven and JUnit versions.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to 3.1.2 for compatibility with newer Maven and JUnit versions.
Upgrade JaCoCo to 0.8.10 for better Java 17 support.
Update OpenAPI documentation library version property to 1.6.14.
Add reactor-test dependency for testing reactive streams.
Remove explicit junit-platform-surefire-provider dependency from surefire plugin as it is bundled in newer versions.
Remove explicit junit-platform-surefire-provider dependency from failsafe plugin as it is bundled in newer versions.
